description: vans brings you the most stylish footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skaters, the SK8 Hi shoes come in a classic high top design. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees.UpperLeather uppers in a high top design for durability and comfortLeather overlays on the sides and stitch detailing for added style and reinforcementBuilt up, padded collar for extra comfortLace-ups for a snug FitBrand name embossed on the back, on the lasting and brand tab appliqued on the tongueCushioned footbed for all day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber outsole for durabilityReverse waffle pattern for better gripLasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
